title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory uses a multi-model orchestration strategy that routes tasks to Claude Opus for complex reasoning and planning, while delegating implementation and validation to Kimi K2.6 for cost efficiency. The factory is built as a self-building codebase that uses custom agent workflows through Archon to optimize reasoning power allocation across different model capabilities.
